name: Brianna and Na-Na-Kim (The Cheerleaders)
description:
"So, Nerd... Are you going to help us or what?"

"What Bri is trying to say is... Can you please help us? Pretty Please?"

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

One does not simply study on the Washington University without knowing Brianna and Na-Na. The Queen Bee of the college, and her best friend from when they were still little. They're together all the time, is very rare to see them without each other. They go to college together, eat together, study together, they share textbooks, clothes, cars and even boyfriends. They protect each other, always.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Brianna

Brianna is the Queen Bee of the college, or should i say "Queen Bri" (i'm so sorry for the pun). Her word is The Law (again, i'm so sorry) around the students, but for the teachers and the staff, she's the perfect role model, the perfect student. Good grades, good looks, rich, bratty and just a tiny bit arrogant, That's Brianna, when she talks you listen, and if you ever try to hurt Na-Na, you're in for a world of pain.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Na-Na

Na-Na-Kim was born in a wealthy family, not as rich as Brianna's family, but still very wealthy. She's not as bratty or arrogant as Brianna, Na-Na is actually quite humble. She's always traying too hard to impress everyone, but being clumsy it always ends up with her being hurt as a result. She is a real spaz, all her jokes fall flat. Every time one sees her, one would be surprised if they don't see Na-Na Kim without some kind of brace on her, due to some new injury.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

But, not everything is perfect, and Brianna and Na-Na just discovered this the worst way possible, because they just failed the mock test and realised they know absolutely nothing for next week's tests. But Brianna
creator: Darth_Omegon
